title: Food and talk
question: 把今天课文里的“正式餐桌 -> 礼貌打开话题 -> 用 Will you be doing...? 问未来安排 -> 看懂短回答 -> 礼貌结束”放进学校晚餐场景。用 word bank 补完整 4 个空。
example_answer: Hi, I'm Li Ming. Will you be joining the activity tomorrow? Will you be watching the school show this weekend? I see. Enjoy your dinner.

options.label: B
options.scenario_zh: 用 Will you be doing...? 问明天是否参加活动

options.label: C
options.scenario_zh: 换一个轻话题：问周末是否会看学校演出

options.label: D
options.scenario_zh: 看懂对方短回答后，礼貌结束
